  <requested_at>2026-06-07</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

检测文件路径\\n    file_pattern = re.compile(r'([a-zA-Z0-9_/]+\\\\.(cpp|h|java|py|kt|md))')\",\"newString\":\"    # 生成标题\\n    if detected_topics:\\n        # 去重并限制数量\\n        unique_topics = list(dict.fromkeys(detected_topics))[:3]\\n        topics['title'] = ' / '.join(unique_topics)\\n        topics['category'] = 'technical'\\n        # 提取关键概念\\n        for t in unique_topics:\\n            topics['key_concepts'].append((t, '本次对话涉及的核心主题'))\\n    else:\\n        # 从最后一条用户消息推断\\n        for msg in reversed(messages):\\n            if msg.get('role') == 'user':\\n                content = msg['content'][:100]\\n                # 清理并截取\\n                title = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w一-鿿]+', ' ', content).strip()\\n                topics['title'] = title or '技术分析'\\n                break\\n\\n    # 检测文件路径\\n    file_pattern = re.compile(r'([a-zA-Z0-9_/]+\\\\.(cpp|h|java|py|kt|md))')\",\"originalFile\":\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n自动知识沉淀脚本\\n从 transcript 中提取高质量对话并生成知识文档\\n\\n触发条件: stop-hook 质量评分 >= 阈值\\n\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\nimport os\\nimport re\\nimport json\\nimport glob\\nfrom datetime import datetime\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\nfrom typing import Dict, List, Optional, Tuple\\nimport sys\\n\\nPROJECT_ROOT = Path(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_ROOT', '.')).resolve()\\nEXPLORATION_DIR = PROJECT_ROOT / \\\"docs\\\" / \\\"exploration\\\"\\nCLAUDE_MD = PROJECT_ROOT / \\\"CLAUDE.md\\\"\\nKNOWLEDGE_STATE = PROJECT_ROOT / \\\".knowledge-system.json\\\"\\n\\n\\ndef extract_messages_from_transcript(transcript_content: str) -> List[Dict]:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"从 JSONL transcript 中提取消息，支持多种格式\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n\\n    # 优先检测格式类型\\n    lines = [l.strip() for l in transcript_content.strip().split('\\\\n') if l.strip()]\\n    if not lines:\\n        return []\\n\\n    # 检测是否为 history.jsonl 格式（有 display 字段）\\n    first_line = lines[0]\\n    try:\\n        first_entry = json.loads(first_line)\\n        is_history_format = 'display' in first_entry\\n    except:\\n        is_history_format = False\\n\\n    messages = []\\n\\n    if is_history_format:\\n        # history.jsonl 格式: {\\\"display\\\": \\\"...\\\", \\\"timestamp\\\": ..., ...}\\n        # display 字段包含用户输入的命令/消息\\n        for line in lines:\\n            try:\\n                entry = json.loads(line)\\n                display = entry.get('display', '')\\n\\n                # 跳过空消息\\n                if not display or len(display) < 3:\\n                    continue\\n\\n                # 跳过系统命令（以 / 或 $ 开头的）\\n                if display.startswith('/') or display.startswith('$'):\\n                    # 如果是有效的问题/讨论，记录为用户消息\\n                    if len(display) > 10:\\n                        messages.append({\\n                            'role': 'user',\\n                            'content': strip_html_tags(display)\\n                        })\\n                    continue\\n\\n                # 检查 pastedContents - 可能包含助手回复\\n                pasted = entry.get('pastedContents', {})\\n                if pasted:\\n                    for key, value in pasted.items():\\n                        if isinstance(value, dict) and 'content' in value:\\n                            content = value.get('content', '')\\n                            if content and len(content) > 20:\\n                                messages.append({\\n                                    'role': 'assistant',\\n                                    'content': content\\n                                })\\n\\n                # display 通常是用户消息\\n                if len(display) > 10:\\n                    messages.append({\\n                        'role': 'user',\\n                        'content': strip_html_tags(display)\\n                    })\\n\\n            except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError):\\n                continue\\n    else:\\n        # 标准 transcript 格式: {\\\"type\\\": \\\"user/assistant\\\", ...}\\n        for line in lines:\\n            try:\\n                entry = json.loads(line)\\n                msg_type = entry.get('type', '')\\n\\n                # 提取用户消息\\n                if msg_type == 'user':\\n                    content = entry.get('message', {}).get('content', '')\\n                    if content and not entry.get('isMeta', False):\\n                        messages.append({\\n                            'role': 'user',\\n                            'content': strip_html_tags(content)\\n                        })\\n\\n                # 提取助手消息\\n                elif msg_type == 'assistant':\\n                    text_content = entry.get('text', '')\\n                    if text_content:\\n                        messages.append({\\n                            'role': 'assistant',\\n                            'content': text_content\\n                        })\\n            except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError):\\n                continue\\n\\n    return messages\\n\\n\\ndef strip_html_tags(text: str) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"去除 HTML 标签\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    return re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', text).strip()\\n\\n\\ndef extract_knowledge_topics(messages: List[Dict]) -> Dict:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"从消息中提取知识主题\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    full_text = '\\\\n'.join([m['content'] for m in messages])\\n    user_text = '\\\\n'.join([m['content'] for m in messages if m.get('role') == 'user'])\\n\\n    topics = {\\n        'title': '',\\n        'category': 'technical',\\n        'files_analyzed': [],\\n        'has_diagram': False,\\n        'has_architecture': False,\\n        'key_concepts': [],\\n        'summary': '',\\n        'code_snippets': [],\\n        'mermaid_diagrams': []\\n    }\\n\\n    # 改进：从用户消息中提取关键主题词\\n    tech_keywords = {\\n        'coredump': 'Coredump 内容分析',\\n        'elf': 'ELF 文件格式',\\n        'arm64': 'ARM64 架构',\\n        'mte': 'MTE 内存标签',\\n        'pac': 'PAC 指针认证',\\n        'signal': '信号处理',\\n        'ptrace': 'Ptrace 调试',\\n        'zygote': 'Zygote 进程',\\n        'jni': 'JNI 桥接',\\n        'opencore': 'OpenCoreSDK',\\n        'crash': '崩溃捕获',\\n        'core-parser': 'Core Parser 工具',\\n        'android': 'Android 系统',\\n        'kernel': '内核机制',\\n        'vma': '虚拟内存区域',\\n        'stack': '堆栈回溯',\\n        'tombstone': 'Tombstone 分析',\\n        'asan': 'ASan 内存检测',\\n        'hwasan': 'HWASan 内存检测',\\n        'lldb': 'LLDB 调试',\\n        'gdb': 'GDB 调试',\\n    }\\n\\n    # 匹配技术主题\\n    detected_topics = []\\n    for keyword, topic_name in tech_keywords.items():\\n        if keyword.lower() in user_text.lower():\\n            detected_topics.append(topic_name)\\n\\n    # 生成标题\\n    if detected_topics:\\n        # 去重并限制数量\\n        unique_topics = list(dict.fromkeys(detected_topics))[:3]\\n        topics['title'] = ' / '.join(unique_topics)\\n        topics['category'] = 'technical'\\n        # 提取关键概念\\n        for t in unique_topics:\\n            topics['key_concepts'].append((t, '本次对话涉及的核心主题'))\\n    else:\\n        # 从最后一条用户消息推断\\n        for msg in reversed(messages):\\n            if msg.get('role') == 'user':\\n                content = msg['content'][:100]\\n                # 清理并截取\\n                title = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w一-鿿]+', ' ', content).strip()\\n                topics['title'] = title or '技术分析'\\n                break\\n\\n    topics = {\\n        'title': '',\\n        'category': 'technical',\\n        'files_analyzed': [],\\n        'has_diagram': False,\\n        'has_architecture': False,\\n        'key_concepts': [],\\n        'summary': '',\\n        'code_snippets': [],\\n        'mermaid_diagrams': []\\n    }\\n\\n    # 检测文件路径\\n    file_pattern = re.compile(r'([a-zA-Z0-9_/]+\\\\.(cpp|h|java|py|kt|md))')\\n    topics['files_analyzed'] = list(set(file_pattern.findall(full_text)))[:10]\\n\\n    # 检测 Mermaid 图表\\n    if '```mermaid' in full_text:\\n        topics['has_diagram'] = True\\n        mermaid_pattern = re.compile(r'```mermaid\\\\s*(.*?)```', re.DOTALL)\\n        topics['mermaid_diagrams'] = mermaid_pattern.findall(full_text)\\n\\n    # 检测架构关键词\\n    arch_keywords = ['架构', '分层', '设计模式', 'architecture', 'layer', 'pattern', 'component']\\n    topics['has_architecture'] = any(kw in full_text.lower() for kw in arch_keywords)\\n\\n    # 提取代码片段\\n    code_pattern = re.compile(r'```[\\\\w]*\\\\s*(.*?)```', re.DOTALL)\\n    topics['code_snippets'] = code_pattern.findall(full_text)[:5]\\n\\n    # 提取标题（查找 # 开头的内容或总结性语句）\\n    title_pattern = re.compile(r'^#\\\\s+(.+)$', re.MULTILINE)\\n    titles = title_pattern.findall(full_text)\\n    if titles:\\n        topics['title'] = titles[0].strip()\\n\\n    # 提取关键概念（查找加粗或特定模式）\\n    concept_pattern = re.compile(r'\\\\*\\\\*(.+?)\\\\*\\\\*[:：]?\\\\s*(.+?)(?=\\\\n\\\\n|\\\\*\\\\*)')\\n    concepts = concept_pattern.findall(full_text)[:10]\\n    topics['key_concepts'] = [(c[0].strip(), c[1].strip()[:100]) for c in concepts]\\n\\n    return topics\\n\\n\\ndef infer_document_title(messages: List[Dict], files: List) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"从对话内容推断文档标题\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    # 查找用户问题作为标题候选\\n    user_questions = []\\n    assistant_content = []\\n\\n    for msg in messages:\\n        if msg['role'] == 'user':\\n            content = msg['content'].strip()\\n            if content and len(content) < 200:\\n                user_questions.append(content)\\n        else:\\n            assistant_content.append(msg['content'])\\n\\n    # 从文件路径推断\\n    if files:\\n        file_paths = [f[0] if isinstance(f, tuple) else f for f in files[:3]]\\n        if file_paths:\\n            # 提取目录和文件名\\n            main_topic = file_paths[0]\\n            if '/' in main_topic:\\n                parts = main_topic.split('/')\\n                main_topic = parts[-1].replace('.cpp', '').replace('.h', '')\\n\\n    # 使用最后一个用户问题\\n    if user_questions:\\n        last_question = user_questions[-1]\\n        # 清理并截取\\n        title = re.sub(r'[^\\\\w一-鿿]+', ' ', last_question).strip()\\n        if len(title) > 50:\\n            title = title[:50] + '...'\\n        return title or '技术分析'\\n\\n    return '技术分析'\\n\\n\\ndef generate_markdown_content(messages: List[Dict], topics: Dict, score: int) -> str:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"生成 Markdown 格式的沉淀文档\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    lines = []\\n    title = topics.get('title') or infer_document_title(messages, topics.get('files_analyzed', []))\\n    now = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\\n\\n    # 头部\\n    lines.append(f\\\"# {title}\\\")\\n    lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    lines.append(f\\\"> 生成时间: {now} | 来源: auto-precipitate (score={score})\\\")\\n    lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # 分析的文件\\n    files = topics.get('files_analyzed', [])\\n    if files:\\n        lines.append(\\\"## 分析的文件\\\")\\n        lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        for f in files[:10]:\\n            path = f[0] if isinstance(f, tuple) else f\\n            lines.append(f\\\"- `{path}`\\\")\\n        lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # 核心发现\\n    lines.append(\\\"## 核心发现\\\")\\n    lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    key_concepts = topics.get('key_concepts', [])\\n    if key_concepts:\\n        for concept, desc in key_concepts:\\n            lines.append(f\\\"- **{concept}**: {desc}\\\")\\n    else:\\n        # 从 assistant 回复中提取第一段作为摘要\\n        for msg in messages:\\n            if msg['role'] == 'assistant' and len(msg['content']) > 100:\\n                first_para = msg['content'].split('\\\\n\\\\n')[0][:500]\\n                lines.append(f\\\"> {first_para}\\\")\\n                break\\n\\n    lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # Mermaid 图表\\n    diagrams = topics.get('mermaid_diagrams', [])\\n    if diagrams:\\n        lines.append(\\\"## 流程图/架构图\\\")\\n        lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        for i, diagram in enumerate(diagrams[:3], 1):\\n            lines.append(f\\\"### 图 {i}\\\")\\n            lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n            lines.append(\\\"```mermaid\\\")\\n            lines.append(diagram.strip())\\n            lines.append(\\\"```\\\")\\n            lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # 代码示例\\n    code_snippets = topics.get('code_snippets', [])\\n    if code_snippets:\\n        lines.append(\\\"## 代码示例\\\")\\n        lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n        for i, code in enumerate(code_snippets[:3], 1):\\n            if len(code) > 50:  # 忽略太短的片段\\n                lines.append(\\\"```cpp\\\")\\n                lines.append(code[:800].strip())\\n                lines.append(\\\"```\\\")\\n                lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # 技术细节\\n    lines.append(\\\"## 技术细节\\\")\\n    lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n\\n    # 提取要点列表\\n    full_text = '\\\\n'.join([m['content'] for m in messages])\\n    bullet_points = re.findall(r'^\\\\s*[-*]\\\\s+(.+)$', full_text, re.MULTILINE)\\n    for point in bullet_points[:10]:\\n        if len(point) > 20 and len(point) < 200:\\n            lines.append(f\\\"- {point}\\\")\\n\\n    lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    lines.append(\\\"---\\\")\\n    lines.append(\\\"\\\")\\n    lines.append(f\\\"**质量评分**: {score}\\\")\\n    lines.append(f\\\"**自动生成**: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\\\")\\n\\n    return '\\\\n'.join(lines)\\n\\n\\ndef get_next_doc_number() -> int:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"获取下一个文档编号\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    if not EXPLORATION_DIR.exists():\\n        return 1\\n\\n    existing = list(EXPLORATION_DIR.glob(\\\"[0-9][0-9]-*.md\\\"))\\n    if not existing:\\n        return 1\\n\\n    numbers = []\\n    for f in existing:\\n        name = f.stem\\n        if name[0].isdigit():\\n            try:\\n                num = int(name[:2])\\n                numbers.append(num)\\n            except ValueError:\\n                continue\\n\\n    return max(numbers) + 1 if numbers else 1\\n\\n\\ndef update_claude_md_index(doc_filename: str, title: str, category: str = 'technical'):\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"更新 CLAUDE.md 的知识库索引\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    if not CLAUDE_MD.exists():\\n        return False\\n\\n    content = CLAUDE_MD.read_text(encoding='utf-8')\\n\\n    #
